title: SELECT EXTRACT is wrong
poc:
SELECT EXTRACT (SECOND FROM FIPS2)
   * 1000000 - 999990 FROM A;
key_bug_features: SELECT EXTRACT with TIMESTAMP precision issue
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE B (ID INT PRIMARY KEY, FIPS2 TIMESTAMP, VALUE DECIMAL(10, 5));
INSERT INTO B VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '1996-08-24 16:03:01.000001', NULL);
SELECT EXTRACT (SECOND FROM FIPS2) * 1000000 - 999990 FROM B WHERE VALUE IS NOT NULL;
SELECT A.ID, EXTRACT (SECOND FROM A.FIPS2) FROM B AS A JOIN B AS C ON A.ID = C.ID WHERE C.VALUE IS NULL;
